children.heading: .—Existence
children.label: a .—Existence
children.text: There is in the Treasury a Federal Citizen Services Fund, General Services Administration, for the purpose of disseminating Federal Government information to the public and for other related purposes.
appropriations from the Treasury for Federal Citizen Services activities;
reimbursements from other federal agencies for costs of distributing publications; and
any other income incident to Center activities.2So in original. See 2009 Amendment notes below.2

children.heading: .—Expenditures
children.label: c .—Expenditures
children.text: Money deposited into the Fund is available for expenditure for Center activities in amounts specified in appropriation laws. The Fund shall assume all liabilities, obligations, and commitments of the Center account.22

children.heading: .—Unobligated Balances
children.label: d .—Unobligated Balances
children.text: Any unobligated balances at the end of a fiscal year remain in the Fund and are available for authorization in appropriation laws for subsequent fiscal years.

children.heading: .—Gift Account
children.label: e .—Gift Account
children.text: The Center may accept and deposit to this account gifts for purposes of defraying the costs of printing, publishing, and distributing consumer information and educational materials and undertaking other consumer information activities. In addition to amounts appropriated or otherwise made available, the Center may expend the gifts for these purposes and any balance remains available for expenditure.22

children.label: f
children.text: The Administrator may enter into agreements with federal agencies to provide services through the Fund on a fully reimbursable basis.

children.heading: .—3See Delayed Effective Date of Amendment note below.3Requirement for Annual Report to Congress
children.label: g .—3See Delayed Effective Date of Amendment note below.3Requirement for Annual Report to Congress

children.text: Information about how the program is funded, including the amount of expenditures the program received in the previous fiscal year and total amount.
The amount of reimbursements associated with or anticipated to be associated with the program from another source of funds or another agency, if applicable.

children.label: A
children.text: information about when the projects or initiatives were initiated and completed; and

children.label: B
children.text: funding information, to the extent practicable.
Any additional information, data, or analysis used to determine the information estimated within the report, if applicable.

children.heading: .—Administrator
children.label: 1 .—Administrator
children.text: The term “Administrator” means the Administrator of General Services.

children.heading: .—Expenditure
children.label: 2 .—Expenditure
children.text: The term “expenditure” means any obligation of funds from the Fund.
